jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Netmeds
jsonLd.description:
Netmeds invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Frontend Developer at our Allahabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Netmeds:
Netmeds is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netmeds!
